entries.title: Recurring subscription charges are now linked to the original authorization
entries.description: The connector securely stores a card reference after the first successful subscription charge and reuses it on every recurring charge, so the network transaction id of the original authorization reaches the issuer and merchant-initiated charges are approved at a significantly higher rate.

entries.title: Subscription cards are now saved for recurring charges
entries.description: On the first charge of a VTEX subscription order, the connector now requests secure storage of the card on successful payment, so subsequent recurring charges can reuse the stored card instead of failing for lack of a saved payment method.

entries.title: VTEX subscription (recurring) order support
entries.description: Adds support for orders created with VTEX subscriptions. The first charge keeps the security code as today, while subsequent recurring charges are authorized without a security code and flagged to the gateway as stored-credential transactions, so automatic renewals no longer fail. Regular checkout is unchanged.

entries.title: CIELO_CYBERSOURCE_FRAUD antifraud provider for split orders
entries.description: Adds CIELO_CYBERSOURCE_FRAUD as an accepted value in the Antifraud Providers for Split Orders setting, alongside RISKIFIED, CYBERSOURCE, and SIGNIFYD.

entries.title: Split-order payment support
entries.description: Adds payment support for VTEX orders that get split into multiple suborders (carts combining products from different sellers or franchises). Each suborder now settles at the gateway with a shared antifraud session, instead of only the first one being paid.

entries.title: Antifraud providers for split orders setting
entries.description: Adds a configuration field so merchants can choose which antifraud providers (RISKIFIED, CYBERSOURCE, SIGNIFYD) receive the shared session. Defaults to RISKIFIED + CYBERSOURCE when left empty.

entries.title: Less noise in error monitoring for expected outcomes
entries.description: Expected outcomes (cancellation denials, callback retries) are now recorded at debug level instead of as errors. Internal observability change — no impact on merchant-facing flows.

entries.title: Optimize authorize hot path
entries.description: Reduces authorization latency by parallelizing previously sequential calls, coalescing duplicate in-flight requests, and tightening the data flow around preflight, persistence, and Yuno API calls. Functional behaviour is preserved end-to-end.

entries.title: Installments-plan endpoint
entries.description: Exposes a new endpoint that returns the configured installments plan for an affiliation, used by Apple Pay and Google Pay to render the correct installment options at checkout.

entries.title: Choose Yuno vs provider transaction ID
entries.description: Adds a Transaction Identification From setting so merchants can choose whether the Yuno TID (default) or the underlying provider TID is returned to VTEX.

entries.title: Transaction Identification From custom field
entries.description: Adds a Transaction Identification From option in the VTEX Admin so merchants can pick between the Yuno TID and the underlying provider TID for the transaction reference.

entries.title: Re-add Payment Mode field to configuration
entries.description: Restores the Payment Mode configuration with the same two options as before: Payment App (default) and Redirect (legacy).

entries.title: Remove Payment Mode setting (later restored)
entries.description: Temporarily removes the Payment Mode configuration field. The setting is restored in the following release.

entries.title: Payment Mode setting for legacy redirect
entries.description: Adds a Payment Mode configuration so merchants can choose between the default Payment App flow and the legacy redirect flow.

entries.title: Upgrade diff and cookie to patch CVE-2026-24001 and CVE-2024-47764
entries.description: Patches two reported third-party vulnerabilities: a denial-of-service in the diff library and a cookie attribute injection in cookie.

entries.title: Recognize VTEX IO transient errors
entries.description: Treats common transient infrastructure errors (timeouts, dropped connections, refused connections) as recoverable so the authorization stays pending instead of failing immediately.

entries.title: Preflight payments for Apple Pay and Google Pay
entries.description: Adds pre-created checkout sessions for Apple Pay and Google Pay so the wallet sheet can be opened immediately when the buyer clicks pay.

entries.title: Route franchise sub-account payments to the correct account
entries.description: On franchise sub-accounts the connector now routes the payment using the order's merchant identifier instead of the parent account hostname, so payments reach the correct sub-account.

entries.title: Retry-payment-validation endpoint
entries.description: Adds an endpoint that resolves "phantom" orders by retrying the payment validation, restoring the simple fire-and-forget callback behaviour.

entries.title: Patch qs vulnerability (CVE-2026-2391)
entries.description: Patches a reported vulnerability in the qs query-string dependency.

entries.title: External-button action for Yuno SDK v1.5
entries.description: Adds an external-button action option that targets Yuno SDK v1.5, used for payment methods that render their own UI outside the SDK.

entries.title: Pin minimatch and koa
entries.description: Locks minimatch and koa to patched versions to close reported regular-expression and request-handling vulnerabilities.

entries.title: Pin qs to 6.14.2
entries.description: Locks qs to the patched version across both root and node workspaces to close a reported vulnerability.

entries.title: Customer payer city for Chile
entries.description: Reads the city from the neighborhood field for Chilean orders, where VTEX populates the city there, so payments are no longer declined for missing city data.

entries.title: Upgrade vulnerable dependencies
entries.description: Bulk upgrade addressing several reported third-party dependency vulnerabilities.

entries.title: OTT metadata headers and Pagaleve close-button toggle
entries.description: Sends OTT metadata headers to the secure-proxy and adds a toggle for the Pagaleve Transparente checkout to hide the VTEX close button.

entries.title: Order placed page URL setting
entries.description: Adds a configuration option for the VTEX order-placed page URL and forwards it through the pending-authorization flow.

entries.title: Patch js-yaml vulnerability
entries.description: Forces js-yaml to a patched version to close CVE-2024-4068.

entries.title: Per-client caching for VTEX APIs
entries.description: Adds in-memory caches across VTEX clients (Account, Affiliations, Catalog, Master Data) to cut redundant API calls and reduce checkout latency.

entries.title: Per-merchant tax ID mapping
entries.description: Adds merchant-aware tax ID (CNPJ) mapping so each payment is tagged with the correct ID and merchant metadata for downstream reconciliation.

entries.title: Add default CNPJ for testing
entries.description: Provides a default merchant tax ID (CNPJ) when the configured affiliation has none, so testing flows can run without manual setup.

entries.title: Update Pagaleve parcelado integration tag
entries.description: Updates the configuration tag for Pagaleve installment-Pix so the connector targets the latest provider integration.

entries.title: Map VTEX fields to Cybersource MDD metadata
entries.description: Maps additional VTEX order fields into Yuno metadata so Cybersource MDD (Merchant Defined Data) rules can use them for fraud screening.

entries.title: Pagaleve Transparente for Pix parcelado
entries.description: Adds Pagaleve Transparente as a supported method for both Pix and installment-Pix flows.

entries.title: Hide installments for Click to Pay
entries.description: Hides the installments option when the buyer is paying with Click to Pay, where instalments are not supported by the upstream networks.

entries.title: Validate transactions before cancel
entries.description: Validates that VTEX transactions exist on the order before triggering the cancellation flow, preventing spurious failures.

entries.title: Restore PicPay support
entries.description: Restores PicPay as a supported payment method after it was unintentionally removed.

entries.title: Apple Pay installment plans
entries.description: Adds installment-plan support for Apple Pay so the merchant's configured installment options appear in the Apple Pay sheet.

entries.title: Group-order handling
entries.description: Treats VTEX order groups as a single payment, avoiding partial-payment artifacts when several orders are placed together.

entries.title: Add Mercado Pago Checkout Pro
entries.description: Adds Mercado Pago Checkout Pro as a redirect-style payment method. Existing Monnet and PicPay redirect flows are unified onto the same shared flow and forward additional payment metadata, including the merchant domain.

entries.title: Defense-mode fallback for delayed card payments
entries.description: Falls back to direct card processing (defense mode) when the standard flow is delayed by fraud screening, completing the payment without losing the order.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Checkout Pro
entries.description: Adds Mercado Pago Checkout Pro as a supported redirect-style payment method.

entries.title: Show status page when a Gift Card is present
entries.description: Renders the standard status page when the order includes a gift-card payment, preventing the connector from short-circuiting the flow.

entries.title: Create-customer toggle
entries.description: Adds an optional Create Customer setting so the connector can register the buyer in Yuno's customer registry before the first payment.

entries.title: Verify tracking_id and tracking_url in fulfillment events
entries.description: Validates tracking_id and tracking_url before forwarding carrier fulfillment events to Yuno so updates with missing values are skipped gracefully.

entries.title: NSU on Pix responses
entries.description: Includes the NSU transaction identifier in the Pix response so it can be reconciled with the bank.

entries.title: Skip redundant payment-status call
entries.description: Skips the payment-status check when the local state is already PENDING, reducing redundant gateway round-trips.

entries.title: Card IIN lookup and dynamic card type detection
entries.description: Looks up the card BIN (IIN) at checkout so the connector can detect the card brand and whether it is credit or debit dynamically, instead of relying on a static configuration.

entries.title: Soft Descriptor configuration
entries.description: Adds a Soft Descriptor configuration field so merchants can control the text that appears on the customer's card statement.

entries.title: Send payment reference in metadata
entries.description: Sends the merchant payment reference along with the payment metadata so it can be used for downstream reconciliation.

entries.title: Patch brace-expansion dependency
entries.description: Upgrades the brace-expansion dependency to a patched version to close a reported vulnerability.

entries.title: Pin brace-expansion across transitive paths
entries.description: Pins brace-expansion across all transitive paths so only the patched version is resolved.

entries.title: Update koa dependency
entries.description: Upgrades the Koa server framework to a newer release line.

entries.title: Revert Koa upgrade
entries.description: Rolls back the Koa framework upgrade shipped in the previous release while compatibility issues are resolved.

entries.title: Support webhook v2
entries.description: Adds support for webhook v2.

entries.title: Non-blocking hostname lookup
entries.description: Removes blocking I/O from the connector's hostname lookup so a slow DNS response can't stall the request.

entries.title: PSE for Colombia
entries.description: Adds PSE (Pagos Seguros en Línea) as a supported payment method for Colombian merchants, using the bank-redirect flow.

entries.title: Proxy authorization header on PCI calls
entries.description: Adds the Proxy-Authorization header on outbound calls that traverse the VTEX IO proxy, fixing 407 responses on tokenized requests.

entries.title: Forward proxy and protocol headers
entries.description: Forwards the original VTEX request headers (X-Forwarded-Proto and Port) so downstream services see the merchant's protocol correctly.

entries.title: Uppercase platform identifier
entries.description: Normalizes the platform identifier sent to Yuno to upper-case, aligning with the gateway's expected enum value.

entries.title: Axios request timeout
entries.description: Adds an explicit timeout to the Axios HTTP client so hanging connections fail fast instead of stalling the payment.

entries.title: Patch tar-fs vulnerability
entries.description: Upgrades the tar-fs dependency to a patched version to close a reported security advisory.

entries.title: Update dependencies
entries.description: Bumps several third-party dependencies to their latest patched versions, including the Koa server framework.

entries.title: Use the VTEX-supplied amount on capture
entries.description: Captures the exact amount that VTEX sends with the capture request, instead of recomputing it from the original order total. This prevents capture mismatches when the order total has changed (partial refunds, gift cards, marketplace splits).

entries.title: Log retry-limit exhaustion
entries.description: Adds a clear log entry when the connector exhausts the retry budget for an outbound request, easing on-call diagnosis.

entries.title: Additional shipping-type mappings
entries.description: Extends the fulfillment mapping with extra shipping types (such as store pickup and marketplace handoff) so more order flows are reported back to the gateway.

entries.title: Total cart value as metadata
entries.description: Includes the total cart value as metadata on each payment, useful for risk scoring and reporting.

entries.title: Preserve original order dates
entries.description: Stops overriding the original order dates when updating a payment, preserving the merchant-facing timestamps.

entries.title: 4-hour retry window for stuck payments
entries.description: Adds a 4-hour retry window before re-attempting a stuck payment, reducing pressure on the gateway.

entries.title: Capture wallet payments
entries.description: Triggers the capture call to Yuno for wallet-based payments so capture timing matches the auto-settle window.

entries.title: 4-hour auto-cancel window
entries.description: Raises the auto-cancellation window to 4 hours, giving slow alternative payment methods enough time to settle.

entries.title: Forward carrier status
entries.description: Retrieves the carrier status from VTEX and forwards it to Yuno as part of the fulfillment update.

entries.title: Send fulfillment completed event
entries.description: Sends a fulfillment-completed event to Yuno when the VTEX order has been fully delivered.

entries.title: Include shipped-at timestamp
entries.description: Sends the actual shipping timestamp in fulfillment updates so Yuno can compute accurate delivery SLAs.

entries.title: Upgrade Axios HTTP client
entries.description: Updates the Axios HTTP client to the latest stable version, picking up bug fixes and security patches.

entries.title: Include product brand on items
entries.description: Includes the product brand on each line item sent to Yuno so brand-level reporting is possible.

entries.title: Skip account lookup when main account is configured
entries.description: Skips the account-lookup call when a main account is already configured, removing a redundant VTEX API request.

entries.title: Skip cancel when payment is still pending
entries.description: Skips the cancellation path when a payment is not yet made and the order is in a transient state, preventing premature aborts.

entries.title: Tracking URL and ID as arrays
entries.description: Sends shipping tracking URL and ID as arrays in fulfillment updates, matching Yuno's updated schema.

entries.title: Reject non-numeric order IDs
entries.description: Adds order-id format validation to reject non-numeric or malformed identifiers before the payment is created.

entries.title: Check for existing Yuno payment before creating
entries.description: Before creating a new Yuno session the connector first checks whether the merchant order already has a payment recorded, avoiding duplicates.

entries.title: Validate and recover order ID
entries.description: Validates the order ID before processing and, when invalid, attempts to recover the canonical order ID from VTEX.

entries.title: Send customer creation date
entries.description: Includes the customer creation date in the payment payload so Yuno can apply customer-tenure-based rules.

entries.title: Support Monnet in Yuno VTEX SDK
entries.description: Adds support for monnet in Yuno VTEX SDK.

entries.title: Patch dependency vulnerabilities (cross-spawn, koa)
entries.description: Patches reported vulnerabilities across two dependencies (cross-spawn and koa) in one update.

entries.title: Send fulfillment events to Yuno
entries.description: Forwards VTEX fulfillment events (shipped, delivered) to Yuno so it reflects the order lifecycle.

entries.title: Expose account name to the front-end
entries.description: Exposes the connector account name to the front-end so multi-account checkouts can be routed correctly.

entries.title: PicPay Wallet
entries.description: Adds PicPay digital wallet as a supported payment method through the wallet-redirect flow.

entries.title: Handle socket hang-ups on Yuno calls
entries.description: Adds handling for socket-level hang-ups when calling the Yuno API, retrying instead of failing the transaction.

entries.title: Coupons total as a separate line item
entries.description: Sends the coupon-discount total as a separate line item to Yuno so the order totals reconcile correctly.

entries.title: Sub-store / multi-account routing
entries.description: Adds sub-store support so franchises can route payments through a parent account when needed.

entries.title: Retry secure-proxy tokenization
entries.description: Adds retries on the Yuno Secure Proxy tokenization call so transient PCI gateway failures don't fail the payment.

entries.title: Sales-channel policy resolution
entries.description: Resolves the sales-channel policy so the connector picks the right policy when multiple are configured on the merchant account.

entries.title: Wait before auto-cancelling
entries.description: Adds a wait window before auto-cancelling a payment, giving wallet redirects enough time to complete.

entries.title: Faster auto-cancel for generic Yuno method
entries.description: Reduces the auto-cancel delay when the payment method is the generic Yuno option, improving the merchant's view of pending transactions.

entries.title: Bump the npm_and_yarn group across 2 directories with 19 updates
entries.description: Patches 19 reported third-party dependency vulnerabilities in one bulk security update.

entries.title: Bump the npm_and_yarn group across 2 directories with 15 updates
entries.description: Patches 15 reported third-party dependency vulnerabilities in one bulk security update.

entries.title: Bump the npm_and_yarn group across 2 directories with 8 updates
entries.description: Patches 8 reported third-party dependency vulnerabilities in one bulk security update.

entries.title: Debit cards (Maestro, Voucher, Elo Débito)
entries.description: Adds Maestro, Visa Electron, Elo Débito, Mastercard Debit and Voucher as supported debit-card payment methods.

entries.title: Upgrade semver-regex
entries.description: Upgrades the semver-regex dependency to patch a reported vulnerability.

entries.title: Patch reported vulnerabilities (group 1)
entries.description: Bulk upgrade of dependencies to patch a batch of reported third-party vulnerabilities.

entries.title: Patch reported vulnerabilities (group 2)
entries.description: Bulk upgrade of dependencies to patch a further batch of reported third-party vulnerabilities.

entries.title: Webhook logging
entries.description: Adds structured logging to the webhook handler so incoming Yuno events can be traced.

entries.title: Send shipping status to Yuno
entries.description: Forwards the order's shipping status as part of the fulfillment update so Yuno has end-to-end order context.

entries.title: Expanded payment status mapping
entries.description: Recognizes additional payment statuses from Yuno so terminal states are mapped correctly back to VTEX.

entries.title: Monnet cash and bank transfer
entries.description: Adds Monnet cash and bank transfer as supported payment methods through an iframe flow.

entries.title: Pix Parcelado
entries.description: Adds Pix Parcelado (installment Pix) as a supported payment method for Brazilian merchants.

entries.title: Approve cancellation when order is already known
entries.description: Returns a cancellation-approved response when the merchant order is already on record, avoiding spurious cancellation failures.

entries.title: Pagaleve one-time Pix
entries.description: Adds support for Pagaleve's single-payment Pix option (a vista).

entries.title: Pagaleve installment Pix
entries.description: Adds support for Pagaleve's installment-Pix offering, letting buyers split a Pix payment over multiple instalments.

entries.title: Add Pagaleve initial support
entries.description: Adds initial support for Pagaleve as a buy-now-pay-later option for Brazilian merchants.

entries.title: Boleto Banco do Brasil
entries.description: Adds Boleto Banco do Brasil as a supported payment option.

entries.title: Pix redirect flow
entries.description: Adds the Pix redirect flow as an alternative to QR code, so merchants can route customers to the bank-side payment page.

entries.title: Richer logs and neighborhood extraction
entries.description: Enriches connector logs with more context and extracts the neighborhood field from VTEX addresses so it can be sent to the gateway.

entries.title: Improve customer address handling
entries.description: Forwards all address sub-fields (state, neighborhood, complement) to Yuno so payments include the complete buyer address.

entries.title: Add Alelo brand
entries.description: Adds the Alelo card brand to the supported payment-method list in the provider configuration.

entries.title: Fix typo on refund description
entries.description: Corrects a typo in the message returned to VTEX after a refund is processed.

entries.title: Fetch payment details from VTEX
entries.description: Looks up payment details from the VTEX transactions API so the connector has accurate context when handling captures and refunds.

entries.title: Remove custom field
entries.description: Removes a custom configuration field that was no longer used by any merchant.

entries.title: Restore AES session encryption
entries.description: Restores AES-256-CBC encryption for sensitive session data passed between front-end and back-end after a regression removed it.

entries.title: Two-card split payments
entries.description: Adds support for splitting a payment across two cards in the same VTEX checkout.

entries.title: Alelo (initial support)
entries.description: Adds Alelo benefit cards as a supported payment method (initial integration).

entries.title: Support Apple pay
entries.description: Adds Apple Pay support, including the Apple-Pay-sheet flow at the VTEX checkout.

entries.title: Alternative payment method status validation
entries.description: Adds payment-status validation for alternative payment methods so the connector reports the correct final state back to VTEX.

entries.title: Forward merchant account on payments
entries.description: Sends the merchant account identifier with each payment so Yuno can resolve the correct affiliation when multiple are configured.

entries.title: Enable Google Pay
entries.description: Activates Google Pay as a supported payment method at the VTEX checkout.

entries.title: Nu Pay support
entries.description: Adds Nu Pay (Nubank's credit-line payment) as a supported method for Brazilian merchants.

entries.title: Boleto Bancário integration
entries.description: Adds support for Boleto Bancário, returning the barcode and payment URL so merchants can render them at checkout.

entries.title: Improve card logs
entries.description: Adds more context to card-payment logs to speed up incident triage and merchant support investigations.

entries.title: Webhook receiver for payment status
entries.description: Adds a webhook receiver so the connector can update VTEX payment status when Yuno publishes terminal events.

entries.title: Add Nubank
entries.description: Adds Nubank as a supported payment method for Brazilian merchants.

entries.title: PagoEfectivo and SafetyPay
entries.description: Adds initial support for PagoEfectivo and SafetyPay as redirect-style payment options targeting Peru.

entries.title: Declare auto-settle support
entries.description: Declares auto-settle support in the provider configuration so VTEX correctly hands off capture timing to the connector.

entries.title: Enable Apple Pay
entries.description: Activates Apple Pay as a supported payment method at the VTEX checkout for merchants enrolled in the Apple Pay program.

entries.title: Support vtex pix
entries.description: Adds support for vtex pix.

entries.title: NSU transaction identifier
entries.description: Includes the NSU (transaction sequence number) in the payment response so merchants can reconcile transactions with the acquirer.

entries.title: Send raw payment response
entries.description: Includes the raw Yuno payment response in the VTEX callback so merchants and support teams have full provider context when investigating.

entries.title: Upgrade event-log library to v1
entries.description: Picks up new fields, bug fixes, and improved trace-ID support from the v1 release of the event-log library.

entries.title: Performance improvement
entries.description: Reduces latency on the payment authorization path through targeted optimizations in the hottest code paths.

entries.title: Yuno event-log library integration
entries.description: Wires in the Yuno event-log library so connector errors are tracked centrally with trace IDs that link gateway and merchant logs.

entries.title: Structured event logs
entries.description: Introduces structured event logging across the connector to make production troubleshooting easier.

entries.title: 3-D Secure support
entries.description: Adds end-to-end 3-D Secure for card payments so merchants can comply with strong-customer-authentication requirements.

entries.title: Event log parsed error fixed
entries.description: Fixes a parsing error that prevented some failures from being recorded in the event log.

entries.title: Bump urijs from 1.19.6 to 1.19.11 in /node
entries.description: Patches several reported vulnerabilities in the urijs URL-parsing dependency.

entries.title: Bump minimatch from 3.0.4 to 3.1.2 in /node
entries.description: Patches a regular-expression denial-of-service issue in the minimatch dependency.

entries.title: Bump @babel/traverse from 7.13.0 to 7.23.6 in /node
entries.description: Patches an arbitrary-code-execution vulnerability in the @babel/traverse build-time dependency.

entries.title: Bump async from 2.6.3 to 2.6.4 in /node
entries.description: Patches a prototype-pollution issue in the async dependency.

entries.title: Return undefined when the payment state is pending
entries.description: Aligns the connector's response for pending payments with VTEX expectations so pending payments are no longer marked as failed.

entries.title: Support for the VTEX card form
entries.description: Adds full support for the VTEX card-payment form across all major brands, including 3-D Secure authentication.

entries.title: Bump semver from 5.7.1 to 5.7.2 in /node
entries.description: Patches a denial-of-service vulnerability reported in the semver dependency.

entries.title: Bump minimatch from 3.0.4 to 3.1.2
entries.description: Patches a regular-expression denial-of-service issue in the minimatch dependency.

entries.title: Bump path-parse from 1.0.6 to 1.0.7
entries.description: Patches a regular-expression denial-of-service vulnerability in the path-parse transitive dependency.

entries.title: Bump json5 from 1.0.1 to 1.0.2
entries.description: Patches a __proto__ prototype-pollution vulnerability in the json5 dependency.

entries.title: Order events
entries.description: Adds order-event tracking so VTEX order state transitions propagate to Yuno.

entries.title: Fix discount handling
entries.description: Corrects how discount amounts are forwarded to the gateway so coupon and promotion values are reflected accurately on the payment.

entries.title: Bump minimist from 1.2.5 to 1.2.8
entries.description: Patches a reported prototype-pollution vulnerability in the minimist dependency.
